---
title: "Séminaire des étudiants de la Chaire CARA"
subtitle: |
  | Client Lifetime Value (CLV): Vue d’ensemble de la métrique chez Co-operators 
  | Idir Saidani, Co-operators 
date: 2023-04-26
toc: TRUE
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}

:::


::: {.column width="2%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](../../img/IdirS.png)
:::

::: {.column width="3%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::

::::
